questions.prompt: Stand out in robotics job market?

choices.text: Portfolio: ROS 2 package on GitHub + demo videos + open-source contributions to MoveIt/Nav2/ROS 2 + ICRA/IROS papers. Stronger than just resume. Companies hire on demonstrated capability.

questions.explanation: Portfolio + open source + papers > resume alone.

choices.text: Humanoids (Tesla Optimus, Figure, Apptronik), foundation models for robotics (VLA: RT-2, OpenVLA, Octo), warehouse automation, surgical robotics, defense. Stagnant: pure industrial arm. Position for ML + manipulation + control.

questions.explanation: Humanoids + VLA + warehouse + surgical + defense booming.
